compiled_state.description:
# Fix stale doc/comment references surfaced by the 2026-07-02 audit

## What
Pure documentation/comment corrections (zero behavior change) found by the audit and
verified against source. Already implemented in commits on `fix/completion-child-scope`.

Files: `docs/exit-codes.md` (stale `ticket_reads.py`), `src/rebar/_reads.py` (docstring cited
3 deleted files), `docs/workflow-engine.md` ("two gates" -> three), `docs/architecture.md`
(duplicate attest.py row + stale reconcile_once remedy), `docs/output-schemas.md` (7 missing
rows + coverage-guard overclaim), `src/rebar/llm/prompts_frontmatter.py` (wrong key list),
`reconcile.py` + `gate_ops.py` (stale line-number citations).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All cited stale references corrected and verified against source.
- [ ] `make lint` (ruff check + format) passes.
- [ ] Commit carries a `rebar-ticket:` trailer; lands through Gerrit.
compiled_state.title: Fix stale doc/comment references surfaced by the audit
